channel.title: Signal vs. Noise
channel.description: Two AI hosts. Real arguments. No hype.
channel.itunes:author: Signal vs. Noise
channel.itunes:keywords: artificial intelligence, AI, AI agents, machine learning, AI law, tech news, autonomous systems, AI ethics, technology, future of work, large language models, AI regulation, daily podcast, AI debate

item.title: Senate GOP Deepfake Ad: Free Speech or Illegal?
item.description:
Senate Republicans ran a deepfake of a Democratic candidate. Was it protected speech or AI-powered election interference? Eric and Bella fight over where the line is — and why disclosure might not be enough.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
item.content:encoded:
Senate Republicans ran a deepfake of a Democratic candidate. Was it protected speech or AI-powered election interference? Eric and Bella fight over where the line is — and why disclosure might not be enough.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
item.itunes:title: Senate GOP Deepfake Ad: Free Speech or Illegal?
item.itunes:summary:
Senate Republicans ran a deepfake of a Democratic candidate. Was it protected speech or AI-powered election interference? Eric and Bella fight over where the line is — and why disclosure might not be enough.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.

item.title: AI Agents Contract Liability: Void If No Legal Authority?
item.description:
AI agents are executing contracts — but they can't be legal agents under agency law. Does that void the deal? Eric and Bella fight over who actually owns the wreckage.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
item.content:encoded:
AI agents are executing contracts — but they can't be legal agents under agency law. Does that void the deal? Eric and Bella fight over who actually owns the wreckage.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
item.itunes:title: AI Agents Contract Liability: Void If No Legal Authority?
item.itunes:summary:
AI agents are executing contracts — but they can't be legal agents under agency law. Does that void the deal? Eric and Bella fight over who actually owns the wreckage.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.

item.title: AI Agent Unauthorized Contract: Agency Law Cover?
item.description:
An AI agent executes a contract no human authorized. Is the deal void — or does agency law cover it? Eric and Bella argue whether existing law can handle autonomous AI, or whether we're flying blind into a legal crisis.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
item.content:encoded:
An AI agent executes a contract no human authorized. Is the deal void — or does agency law cover it? Eric and Bella argue whether existing law can handle autonomous AI, or whether we're flying blind into a legal crisis.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
item.itunes:title: AI Agent Unauthorized Contract: Agency Law Cover?
item.itunes:summary:
An AI agent executes a contract no human authorized. Is the deal void — or does agency law cover it? Eric and Bella argue whether existing law can handle autonomous AI, or whether we're flying blind into a legal crisis.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.

item.title: Agentic AI Liability: Courts or Federal Preemption?
item.description:
Who pays when an AI agent goes rogue? Courts haven't ruled, states are patchworking, and enterprises are deploying anyway. Eric and Bella debate AI liability, autonomous systems, and whether federal preemption is inevitable.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
item.content:encoded:
Who pays when an AI agent goes rogue? Courts haven't ruled, states are patchworking, and enterprises are deploying anyway. Eric and Bella debate AI liability, autonomous systems, and whether federal preemption is inevitable.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
item.itunes:title: Agentic AI Liability: Courts or Federal Preemption?
item.itunes:summary:
Who pays when an AI agent goes rogue? Courts haven't ruled, states are patchworking, and enterprises are deploying anyway. Eric and Bella debate AI liability, autonomous systems, and whether federal preemption is inevitable.
Signal vs. Noise is an AI-hosted podcast.
